product_overview: A structured productivity backend that supports hierarchical goals, timed focus sessions, journaling, failure tracking, and soft-delete recovery with an emphasis on local-first caching and offline-resilient sync.
core_goals: Provide a structured, hierarchical goals system (year/month/week/day) with measurable progress
Enable focused, timed sessions tied to goals with enforced single active session and outcome logging
Offer journaling and failure-tracking flows to surface learnings and improvement suggestions
Support soft-delete (trash) and recovery to prevent accidental data loss
Expose a simple, verifiable API surface for frontend sync while honoring auth and local-first constraints

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Lightweight endpoint to verify the API and its core dependencies are up.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with {status: 'ok', timestamp: <epoch ms>}
GET /api/health -> Receive 500 with {error: 'database_unavailable'}

features.name: Framework Management
features.description: Create and list reusable goal frameworks (templates) that attach structured schema to goals.
user_flows: POST /api/frameworks with Authorization: Bearer <valid Firebase ID token> and JSON {name: 'Finance Template', schema: {...}} -> Receive 201 with created framework {id, name, schema}
GET /api/frameworks with Authorization: Bearer <valid Firebase ID token> -> Receive 200 with array of active frameworks
POST /api/frameworks without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/frameworks with Authorization: Bearer <token> when auth backend misconfigured -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable with {error: 'auth_unavailable'}

features.name: Goal Management
features.description: Create, query and manage hierarchical goals scoped to time periods (year/month/week/day) and linked to frameworks.
user_flows: POST /api/goals with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {title: 'Save $10k', period: 'year', category: 'Finance', frameworkId: '<id>'} -> Receive 201 with created goal {id, title, period, status, parentId}
GET /api/goals?period=month&status=active with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> -> Receive 200 with filtered goals array
POST /api/goals with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and malformed body (missing title) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors
GET /api/goals without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Session Tracking
features.description: Start and end timed focus sessions tied to a daily goal; enforce single active session and record outcomes and improvement notes.
user_flows: POST /api/sessions with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {goalId: '<dailyGoalId>', durationMinutes: 25, type: 'focus'} -> Receive 201 with session {id, goalId, startTime, status: 'active'}

POST /api/sessions/:id/end with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {achieved: false, mistakes: ['lost focus'], improvements: ['disable notifications']} -> Receive 200 with ended session summary {id, duration, achieved, metrics}
POST /api/sessions with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> when another active session exists -> Receive 409 Conflict with {error: 'active_session_exists'}
POST /api/sessions/<nonexistent-id>/end with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Journaling
features.description: Create and list structured life or goal journals for daily/weekly/monthly reflections and to surface learnings.
user_flows: POST /api/journals with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {scope: 'weekly', title: 'Weekly Review', content: 'Reflections...', goalId: '<optional>'} -> Receive 201 with created journal entry {id, scope, title, content, createdAt}
GET /api/journals?scope=weekly with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> -> Receive 200 with array of journal entries filtered by scope
POST /api/journals with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and missing required field (scope) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation message
GET /api/journals without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Failure Logging
features.description: Quickly capture failures tied to sessions, goals, or general usage to inform improvement suggestions and analytics.
user_flows: POST /api/failures with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {title: 'Missed focus', sessionId: '<sessionId>', notes: 'Got distracted'} -> Receive 201 with created failure {id, title, sessionId, notes, createdAt}
POST /api/failures with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {title: 'Generic failure'} -> Receive 201 with created failure {id, title, createdAt}
POST /api/failures without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/failures with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and empty body -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

features.name: Trash & Recovery
features.description: List soft-deleted items and restore them to prevent accidental permanent deletion.
user_flows: GET /api/trash with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> -> Receive 200 with array of deleted items {id, type, deletedAt, metadata}
POST /api/trash/restore with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {id: '<deletedItemId>'} -> Receive 200 with restored item {id, type, status: 'restored'}
POST /api/trash/restore with Authorization: Bearer <valid token> and JSON {id: '<nonexistentId>'} -> Receive 404 Not Found with {error: 'item_not_found'}
GET /api/trash without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Session Tracking
features.description: Timed focus sessions for daily goals

known_limitations.issue: Auth requires specific Firebase environment variables
known_limitations.impact: API auth returns 503 if not configured
Data is not shared across multiple instances
